videos.headline: Diego Pavia spreads credit for Vanderbilt's explosive start
videos.description: After the Commodores score 50 points or more in back-to-back games for the first time since 1915 and he accounts for six TDs, QB Pavia praises his O-line and receivers.

tracking.trackingName: SEC_NCF Interview (Pavia Vandy) 250927
